stemHtml: According to the TEM Model, threats are grouped in two basic categories. One of these categories refers to environmental threats and the other category refers to:

options.a: Organisational threats that occur due to the organisation in aviation structures.
options.b: Operational threats that occur due to the organisation in aviation structures.
options.c: Human performance threats that occur due to the human performance of aviation personnel.
options.d: Technical threats that occur due to the technical part of the aeronautical operations, e.g. aircraft malfunctions.
